title: Aurora Project Snapshot
description: Hand-off artifact that travels between Aurora specialist agents during a multi-agent (DEEP mode) project. Written as a JSON file in the user's project directory (default: aurora-project.json at the project root). Each agent reads the snapshot, performs its work, then updates the snapshot before the next agent runs.

schema_version.description: Snapshot schema version. Major bump = breaking change.

project_id.description: Stable UUID v4 generated by the orchestrator (aurora SKILL.md) when the snapshot is first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent agent update.

snapshot_file_path.description: Path (relative to project root, or absolute) where the snapshot file lives on disk. Optional informational field.

current_agent.description: Soul name of the agent currently holding the snapshot (e.g. 'volt', 'sage', 'iris'). The orchestrator sets this before invoking the agent.

agents_completed.description: Ordered list of soul names that have finished their work. Each agent appends itself when done.

agents_pending.description: Ordered list of soul names that still need to run. The orchestrator computes this from the project plan.

user_requirements.description: Free-form list of what the user asked for, in their own words. Carried verbatim so downstream agents see the original intent, not Volt's translation of it.

selected_board.description: board_id matching a profile under aurora/references/boards/. Null if the project does not involve ESPHome hardware.

selected_components.description: List of component_id values matching profiles under aurora/references/components/.

gpio_allocation.description: Mapping of component_id → role → GPIO number(s). Example: {'bme280': {'sda': 8, 'scl': 9}, 'ld2410': {'tx': 4, 'rx': 5}}.

entity_ids_generated.description: Home Assistant entity IDs produced by upstream agents (e.g. sensor.living_room_temperature). Sage uses this list when wiring automations; Iris uses it for dashboards.

esphome_filename.description: Filename Volt wrote the ESPHome config to, if any.

ha_yaml_files.description: Paths (relative to the HA config dir) that Sage produced or modified, e.g. automations.yaml, scripts.yaml.

failures.description: Failure messages produced by validators. Empty if status is passed.

validation_results.description: Per-agent validation outcome. Key is the agent's soul name (e.g. 'volt'). Pending until the agent runs; passed/failed once it has.

raised_by.description: Soul name of the agent (or human reviewer) that flagged the conflict.

blocks_agent.description: Soul name of the agent whose work cannot proceed until resolved.

resolution.description: How the conflict was resolved. Null until resolved.

conflict_log.description: Open and resolved conflicts between agents. A non-empty list with unresolved entries blocks DEEP mode from completing.

notes.description: Free-form notes added by agents or the orchestrator. Used for context that does not fit a structured field.
